ingest.verified: gate ingest->cluster passed: status=done, rollup present, low_confidence_field_fraction 0.085 <= 0.4

gates.ingest->cluster: events.json present; meta.status=done (or justified partial); meta.confidence_rollup present; low_confidence_field_fraction <= 0.4 (else surface to human)
gates.cluster->elicit: clusters.json present with >=1 coarse theme; affinities.json present
gates.elicit->schedule: profile.json present; status=stable; objective_weights present; outlier_probes_done >= 1 (diversity floor)
gates.schedule->done: schedule.json present; objective_breakdown present (with user weights echoed); unresolved_conflicts surfaced (not silently resolved)
